## Summary
<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / scenario
- [ ] Refactor / improvement
- [ ] CI / build change
- [ ] Documentation

## Testing
- [ ] New/updated feature files cover the change
- [ ] Existing smoke suite still passes locally
- [ ] Tested in headless mode (`-Dheadless=true`)

## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows project style (no Checkstyle warnings)
- [ ] No unnecessary `Thread.sleep()` — use explicit waits
- [ ] Screenshots captured on failure via hooks
- [ ] PR title is descriptive (e.g., `feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`)

Closes #
